3325690.name: Lost & Found Collection
3325690.description:
Lost & Found Collection is an immersive, PSX-style horror game where each VHS tape you discover unveils a unique story within the same eerie universe. Set in different but interconnected locations and timelines, each tape offers a fresh narrative and new mysteries to explore, drawing you deeper into the dark secrets of the world.

Features:

Multiple Stories: Every VHS tape contains a self-contained story, all within the same universe.

Expanding Content: New tapes with fresh stories will be added over time, expanding the narrative.

Retro PSX-Style Visuals: Experience a nostalgic, pixelated horror aesthetic.

Atmospheric Gameplay: Engage in tense, story-driven gameplay, rich in mystery and suspense.

Explore, uncover the truth, and dive into a chilling journey where every tape brings you closer to the heart of the mystery.
3325690.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
